# Phone Flip Challenge — LLMs Instructions
# https://phoneflipchallenge.com/llms.txt
# Format: https://llmstxt.org/

# This file provides guidance for AI assistants (LLMs) crawling this website.

> Phone Flip Challenge is a free mobile skill game where players flip their real phone into the air and catch it to score points. Available on Android and iOS.

## About

Phone Flip Challenge is developed by Theoretical Studio (a.k.a. Challengeman Games).
The game turns the classic "phone flip" trick into a scored, competitive experience.
Players can compete globally, join challenges, and share their flips on social media.

## Key Facts

- **Genre**: Arcade / Skill / Casual
- **Platform**: Android (Google Play), iOS (App Store), Telegram Bot
- **Price**: Free to play, optional in-app purchases
- **Developer**: Theoretical Studio LLP
- **Rating**: 4.5 / 5 (60,000+ ratings on Google Play)
- **Hashtags**: #phoneflipchallenge #phoneflip

## Downloads & Links

- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.TheoreticalStudio.PhoneFlip
- Telegram Bot: https://t.me/PhoneFlipChallenge_bot
- Official Website: https://phoneflipchallenge.com

## Community & Social

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@challengeman_games
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/challengeman_games
- Discord: https://discord.gg/99q7qEAmnj
- TikTok: @phoneflipchallenge

## Pages

- [Home](https://phoneflipchallenge.com/) — Hero, game overview, download links, World Challenge
- [Store](https://phoneflipchallenge.com/store.html) — Vote for merch and VIP items
- [Creator's Kit](https://phoneflipchallenge.com/creators-kit.html) — Resources for content creators

## How to Play

1. Download the app from Google Play or App Store
2. Open the app and hold your phone
3. Flip your phone into the air
4. Catch it accurately to score points
5. Compete on the global leaderboard

## World Phone Flip Challenge

Anyone can participate in the World Phone Flip Challenge:
1. Flip your phone and make a record in the app
2. Film yourself doing the flip
3. Publish the video on social media with #phoneflipchallenge and tag a friend

## Contact

- Support: https://phoneflipchallenge.com/support.html
- Partners: https://phoneflipchallenge.com/for-partners.html
